Hero.name: DIEGO NR
Hero.description_1: I'm a hybrid Solutions Architect who fuses native UI/UX expertise with efficiency-oriented software engineering. I operate beyond traditional web development, specializing in AI-Augmented Development and system orchestration.
Hero.description_2: My approach is syntax-agnostic but strict on data structure: I master workflow automation, ETL pipelines, and SDLC industrialization.
Hero.image_alt: Portrait of Diego NR, Solutions Architect

About.label: [01 — ABOUT]
About.heading: WHO AM I?
About.subtitle: Solutions architect with a passion for creating exceptional digital experiences.
About.bio_1: I'm a full-stack developer with over 5 years of experience building digital products that combine exceptional design with robust architecture.
About.bio_2: I currently specialize in AI-Augmented Development, where I use language models to automate workflows and accelerate the software development cycle.
About.bio_3: I believe in writing clean, documented, and maintainable code. Every project is an opportunity to create something elegantly simple.

Services.description: Specialized services to transform ideas into exceptional digital products.
